TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_salatlat, title = salatlat, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/salatlat} }

S.FORM: == satangahan == u zuma a sulit sipilatlat musaungay u zuma a kamu nu Hulam a kamu:ťĀčŚčē,śīĽŚčē nu Amilika a kamu:Sports, activities
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan == u zuma a sur~…ĺit sipir~…ĺatr~…ĺat musauŇčaj u zuma a kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam a kamu:**,** nu amir~…ĺika a kamu:sports, a ¶ti*iti…ôs
S.FORM: == satangahan == u zuma a sulit sipilatlat musaungay u zuma a kamu nu Hulam a kamu:ťĀčŚčē,śīĽŚčē nu Amilika a kamu:Sports, activities
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan == u zuma a sur~…ĺit sipir~…ĺatr~…ĺat musauŇčaj u zuma a kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam a kamu:**,** nu amir~…ĺika a kamu:sports, a ¶ti*iti…ôs
